layers.title: Document sampler design
layers.summary: This layer adds repository AI context for the new LogSampler design and wires it into the context index. It explains the request/access/diagnostic sampling model, hot-path constraints, RPC propagation, and expected validation scenarios.
layers.diff:
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
+- `LogSampler` provides unified random hash-threshold sampling across request/access/diagnostic dimensions, with per-request granularity and low-overhead hot-path decisions.
+- `AccessRecorder::Object`, `AccessRecorder::Stream`, and `AccessRecorder::RequestOut` are the recommended access-log facades. Call sites describe fields and call `Record()`; sampling, lazy field materialization, elapsed time, formatting, and exporter writes are owned by `AccessRecorder`.
+## Log Processing Flow
+1. FATAL/CHECK -> always pass
+2. External API access / client access log -> force emit when request is sampled in; otherwise apply access_sample_rate
+3. ERROR/WARNING/PLOG with request context -> force emit if request is sampled in; otherwise check diagnostic_sample_rate
+4. Request INFO/VLOG -> make one random request-trace decision via request_sample_rate; reuse it for the trace

layers.title: Replace public config knobs
layers.summary: The old per-second `log_rate_limit` setting is replaced with three double sample-rate controls. EmbeddedConfig exposes the new request/access/diagnostic methods, so embedded users move from a quota API to ratio-based sampling.

layers.title: Validate sampler flags transactionally
layers.summary: Runtime flag handling now recognizes the three sampler flags as a batch. The implementation validates candidate values, applies them transactionally, and only commits the LogSampler config if the whole update succeeds.

layers.title: Update deployment surfaces
layers.summary: Helm, worker config, dscli docs, and the logging guide now describe sample rates instead of rate limits. The standalone client environment variable documentation removes `DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT`, matching the worker-authoritative configuration model.

bcFindings.evidence: `include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h` removes `EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit);` and replaces it with `RequestSampleRate(double)`, `AccessSampleRate(double)`, and `DiagnosticSampleRate(double)`.
Deployment/docs/config hunks remove `log_rate_limit`/`logRateLimit` and replace them with request/access/diagnostic sample-rate flags with no compatibility mapping.
`docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md` deletes the documented standalone client environment variable `DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT`.

layers.title: Add LogSampler
layers.summary: The new core sampler owns normalized sample rates, immutable snapshots, salt-based hash thresholds, and hot-path entry points. It keeps disabled sampling to a relaxed atomic check and classifies runtime logs into request, diagnostic, access, or bypass paths.

layers.title: Replace rate limiter
layers.summary: The spdlog rate limiter target and header are removed from the build. Log creation now asks LogSampler after the normal severity gate, preserving FATAL behavior and avoiding the old first-N request quota.

layers.title: Adjust metrics coupling
layers.summary: The logging/metrics coupling is updated for the sampler-backed pipeline. Resource metric collection changes remain small and stay in the common logging blast radius.
layers.diff:
diff --git a/src/datasystem/common/metrics/res_metric_collector.cpp b/src/datasystem/common/metrics/res_metric_collector.cpp
--- a/src/datasystem/common/metrics/res_metric_collector.cpp
+++ b/src/datasystem/common/metrics/res_metric_collector.cpp
@@
-// adjusted with logging sampler integration
+// resource metrics remain outside request/access sampling

bcFindings.evidence: `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h` and `.cpp` are deleted, removing the public `LogRateLimiter` class and its methods.

layers.title: Add sampler config proto
layers.summary: The shared-memory protobuf gains `LogSampleConfigPb` and carries it in register and heartbeat responses. `RegisterClientRspPb` reuses field 24 with a different type/name, changing the wire contract for clients generated against the old schema.

layers.title: Propagate sample state
layers.summary: ZMQ metadata now uses LogSampler to create and apply request sample state instead of LogRateLimiter. Register and heartbeat responses publish the effective sampler config so clients follow the worker authority.

bcFindings.evidence: `src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto` changes field 24 from `int32 log_rate_limit = 24;` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 24;`, changing the generated accessor and protobuf wire type.

layers.title: Introduce lazy facades
layers.summary: AccessRecorder is reshaped around Object, Stream, and RequestOut recorder facades that skip field materialization when sampling says not to record. The previous direct Record overloads and stream wrapper are removed, so callers must use builder-style field setters and final `Record()`.

layers.title: Migrate client call sites
layers.summary: C, C++, Java, Python, hetero, object, KV, and stream client paths switch from constructing `RequestParam` eagerly to describing fields through lazy recorder facades. This preserves access log output while avoiding payload construction when access sampling drops the event.

layers.title: Migrate worker call sites
layers.summary: Worker object, stream, and request-manager paths adopt the same recorder facades. Etcd request-out logging is kept outside access sampling while using the new typed RequestOut path.

bcFindings.evidence: `access_recorder.h` removes the old public `Record` overloads taking string `dataSize` and request params; callers must now use typed facade setters plus `Record()`.
`access_recorder.h` removes the integer-code `Record` overload with string `dataSize`; the replacement records through `ObjectAccessRecorder::DataSize(uint64_t)` and final `Record()`.
`access_recorder.h` deletes the public `explicit AccessRecorder(std::string keyName);` constructor.
`access_recorder.h` removes `struct AccessRecorderStreamWrap` and replaces worker stream signatures with `std::shared_ptr<StreamAccessRecorder>`.

layers.title: Replace limiter tests
layers.summary: The old LogRateLimiter tests are deleted and the spdlog log-message tests are rewritten for sampler behavior. New unit tests cover derivation, proto config, runtime log classification, access guard behavior, and facade formatting.

layers.title: Add system propagation test
layers.summary: System tests exercise cross-process request reject propagation, sampler consistency, and worker-to-client config delivery. Existing log-size ST parameters are migrated away from `log_rate_limit`.

summary: This PR replaces the old first-N log rate limiter with a worker-authoritative random LogSampler spanning request, access, and diagnostic logs, with new config/proto propagation, lazy access logging facades, deployment/docs updates, and expanded tests.
